### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: ref https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/29661

### What is changed and how it works?

Support optimize trace rule predicate push down


root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: support race.
